steps.instruction:
*🔐 Step 1: Get IT Approval First (MANDATORY)*
• Before installing ANY software on your company machine, you MUST get permission from the IT team.
• Message the IT help desk or your IT manager and request approval to install WPS Office.
• Do NOT proceed with installation until IT confirms approval.
_Expected: You receive a written or Slack confirmation from IT to go ahead._

*📥 Step 2: Download WPS Office Installer*
• Once IT approves, download the official WPS Office installer using this link:
`https://wdl1.pcfg.cache.wpscdn.com/wpsdl/wpsoffice/onlinesetup/distsrc/200.1087/wpsinst/wps_office_inst.exe`
• Save the `.exe` file to your Desktop or Downloads folder.
_Expected: A file named `wps_office_inst.exe` is downloaded._

*🖱️ Step 3: Run the Installer*
• Locate the downloaded file `wps_office_inst.exe`.
• Right-click on the file → Select *Run as administrator*.
• If prompted by Windows UAC (User Account Control), click *Yes* to allow.
_Expected: The WPS Office setup wizard opens._

*⚙️ Step 4: Complete the Installation*
• Read and accept the License Agreement.
• Choose the installation path (default is recommended).
• Click *Install Now* or *Custom Install* based on your preference.
• Wait for the installation to complete — it may take 2-5 minutes.
_Expected: Installation completes and WPS Office desktop shortcut appears._

*✅ Step 5: Launch and Verify*
• Open WPS Office from the desktop shortcut or Start Menu.
• Sign in or continue as a guest if prompted.
• Open a test document to verify everything works correctly.
• Inform IT team that installation is done.
_Expected: WPS Office opens successfully and is ready to use._
